revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Gakusei]][[ja:学制]]


{{Otheruses|{{ill|Educational Ordinance of 1872|ja|明治5th year （1872nd year ）に公布された教育法令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Educational Ordinance of 1872|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}|General abbreviation of school systems|{{ill|School system|ja|学校制度|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/School system|1=school system|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q744026}}|}}
{{Unreferenced|date=2021-09}}
{{Infobox Japanese law
|name = Gakusei
|status = Repealed
|type = {{ill|Educational law|ja|教育法|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Educational law|comment=changed title based on wikidata|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=Education law|qid=Q2251446}}
|agency = {{ill|Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture|en|Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture|qid=Q11080185|lt=Ministry of Education (Japan)|1=Ministry of Education, Science, Sports and Culture}}
|contents =
|related =
|link = [{{NDLDC|787952/130}} 法令全書 明治5th year ]
|wikisource = {{ill|Gakusei|ja|学制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gakusei|comment=enwiki is a redirect|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
}}
'''Gakusei''' (学制, {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=Meiji 5|1=1872}} August 2nd, Daijōkan No. 214<ref>{{Cite web|和書 |title=法令全書. 明治5th year  - 国立国会図書館デジタルコレクション |url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/info:ndljp/pid/787952 |website=dl.ndl.go.jp |accessdate=2022-03-11}}</ref>) was Japan's first legal ordinance concerning a modern school education system.

Promulgated by the {{ill|Daijō-kan|en|Daijō-kan|qid=Q1192939|lt=Daijō-kan|1=Daijō-kan}} on {{ill|September 4, 1872|ja|1872nd year 9月4日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September 4, 1872|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, it consisted of 109 chapters and outlined six main categories: "University Districts," "Schools," "Teachers," "Students and Exams," "Regulations for Overseas Students," and "Educational Funding."<ref>[https://www.nier.go.jp/library/shiryoannai/shiryo3.html 学制・太政官布告第214号（被仰出書）] 国立教育政策研究所、2016.11</ref> The system divided the country into school districts, aiming for universal education regardless of social status or gender. It was repealed with the {{ill|Educational Ordinance|ja|教育令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Educational Ordinance|qq=}} on {{ill|September 29, 1879|ja|1879th year 9月29日|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September 29, 1879|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

{{See also|History of Japan's school systems}}

== School Districts ==

The "Gakusei" adopted a district-based system modeled after {{ill|France's educational system|ja|フランスの学制|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/France's educational system|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Chapter 3 divided the nation into eight university districts, each with a university, 32 secondary school districts for middle schools, and 210 elementary school districts for primary schools, planning for a total of 53,760 primary schools. The districts were revised the following year, reducing the number of university districts to seven.

=== Initial School Districts ===
{|class="wikitable"
!University District!!Prefectures
|-
|First||'''{{ill|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|en|Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)|qid=Q1189121|lt=Tokyo|1=Tokyo Prefecture (1868–1943)}}''', {{ill|Kanagawa Prefecture|en|Kanagawa Prefecture|qid=Q127513|lt=Kanagawa|1=Kanagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|qid=Q128186|lt=Saitama|1=Saitama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Iruma|ja|入間県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iruma|1=Iruma Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11389086}}, {{ill|Kisarazu|ja|木更津県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kisarazu|1=Kisarazu Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11518523}}, {{ill|Ashigara|ja|足柄県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashigara|1=Ashigara Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11636907}}, {{ill|Inba|ja|印旛県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inba|1=Inba Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11409098}}, {{ill|Niihari|ja|新治県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Niihari|1=Niihari Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11502680}}, {{ill|Ibaraki Prefecture|en|Ibaraki Prefecture|qid=Q83273|lt=Ibaraki|1=Ibaraki Prefecture}}, {{ill|Gunma Prefecture|en|Gunma Prefecture|qid=Q129499|lt=Gunma|1=Gunma Prefecture}}, {{ill|Tochigi Prefecture|en|Tochigi Prefecture|qid=Q44843|lt=Tochigi|1=Tochigi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Utsunomiya|ja|宇都宮県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Utsunomiya|1=Utsunomiya Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11449795}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|en|Yamanashi Prefecture|qid=Q132720|lt=Yamanashi|1=Yamanashi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shizuoka Prefecture|en|Shizuoka Prefecture|qid=Q131320|lt=Shizuoka|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}
|-
|Second||'''{{ill|Aichi Prefecture|en|Aichi Prefecture|qid=Q80434|lt=Aichi|1=Aichi Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Nukata Prefecture|en|Nukata Prefecture|qid=Q3070843|lt=Okazaki|1=Nukata Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hamamatsu|ja|浜松県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamamatsu|1=Hamamatsu Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11557878}}, {{ill|Inuyama|ja|犬山県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Inuyama|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 犬山藩|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 犬山藩|1=Inuyama Domain|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1004357}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu|1=Gifu Prefecture}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|qid=Q128196|lt=Mie|1=Mie Prefecture}}, {{ill|Watarai|ja|度会県|zh|度會縣|fr|Préfecture de Watarai|1=Watarai Prefecture|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Watarai|13=User:Immanuelle/Watarai Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11486130}}
|-
|Third||'''{{ill|Ishikawa Prefecture|en|Ishikawa Prefecture|qid=Q131281|lt=Ishikawa|1=Ishikawa Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Nanao|ja|七尾県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nanao|1=Nanao Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11353500}}, {{ill|Shinkawa|ja|新川県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinkawa|1=Niikawa Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11502104}}, {{ill|Asuwa|ja|足羽県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuwa|1=Asuwa Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11637047}}, {{ill|Tsuruga|ja|敦賀県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuruga|1=Tsuruga Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11499551}}, {{ill|Chikuma|ja|筑摩県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikuma|1=Chikuma Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11602831}}
|-
|Fourth||'''{{ill|Osaka Prefecture|en|Osaka Prefecture|qid=Q122723|lt=Osaka|1=Osaka Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Kyoto Prefecture|en|Kyoto Prefecture|qid=Q120730|lt=Kyoto|1=Kyoto Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|qid=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo|1=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|qid=Q131287|lt=Nara|1=Nara Prefecture}}, {{ill|Sakai|ja|堺県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakai|1=Sakai Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11428319}}, {{ill|Wakayama Prefecture|en|Wakayama Prefecture|qid=Q131314|lt=Wakayama|1=Wakayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shikama|ja|飾磨県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikama|1=Shikama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11666801}}, {{ill|Toyooka|ja|豊岡県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyooka|1=Toyooka Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11633475}}, {{ill|Kōchi Prefecture|en|Kōchi Prefecture|qid=Q134093|lt=Kochi|1=Kōchi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Myodo|ja|名東県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Myodo|1=Myōdō Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9610752}}, {{ill|Kagawa Prefecture|en|Kagawa Prefecture|qid=Q161454|lt=Kagawa|1=Kagawa Prefecture}}, {{ill|Okayama Prefecture|en|Okayama Prefecture|qid=Q132936|lt=Okayama|1=Okayama Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|qid=Q131358|lt=Shiga|1=Shiga Prefecture}}
|-
|Fifth||'''{{ill|Hiroshima Prefecture|en|Hiroshima Prefecture|qid=Q617375|lt=Hiroshima|1=Hiroshima Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Tottori Prefecture|en|Tottori Prefecture|qid=Q133935|lt=Tottori|1=Tottori Prefecture}}, {{ill|Shimane Prefecture|en|Shimane Prefecture|qid=Q132751|lt=Shimane|1=Shimane Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hokjo|ja|北条県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokjo|1=Hōjō Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11402185}}, {{ill|Oda|ja|小田県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda|1=Oda Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11463166}}, {{ill|Ishite|ja|石鉄県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishite|1=Ishizuchi Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10440951}}, {{ill|Kozan|ja|神山県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kozan|1=Q11589553|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11589553}}, {{ill|Yamaguchi Prefecture|en|Yamaguchi Prefecture|qid=Q127264|lt=Yamaguchi|1=Yamaguchi Prefecture}}, {{ill|Hamada|ja|浜田県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hamada|1=Hamada Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11557991}}
|-
|Sixth||'''{{ill|Nagasaki Prefecture|en|Nagasaki Prefecture|qid=Q169376|lt=Nagasaki|1=Nagasaki Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Saga Prefecture|en|Saga Prefecture|qid=Q160420|lt=Saga|1=Saga Prefecture}}, {{ill|Yatsushiro|ja|八代県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatsushiro|1=Yatsushiro Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11390556}}, {{ill|Shirakawa|ja|白川県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirakawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊本県の歴史|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 熊本県の歴史|1=History of Kumamoto Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11568214}}, {{ill|Mimitsu|ja|美々津県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mimitsu|1=Mimitsu Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11608658}}, {{ill|Miyakonojo|ja|都城県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyakonojo|1=Miyakonojō Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11643549}}, {{ill|Kokura Prefecture|en|Kokura Prefecture|qid=Q5765997|lt=Kokura|1=Kokura Prefecture}}, {{ill|Ōita Prefecture|en|Ōita Prefecture|qid=Q133924|lt=Oita|1=Ōita Prefecture}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|qid=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka|1=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, {{ill|Mizuma|ja|三潴県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizuma|1=Mizuma Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11356619}}, {{ill|Kagoshima Prefecture|en|Kagoshima Prefecture|qid=Q15701|lt=Kagoshima|1=Kagoshima Prefecture}}
|-
|Seventh||'''{{ill|Niigata Prefecture|en|Niigata Prefecture|qid=Q132705|lt=Niigata|1=Niigata Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Kashiwazaki|ja|柏崎県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kashiwazaki|1=Kashiwazaki Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11533748}}, {{ill|Okitama|ja|置賜県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okitama|1=Okitama Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11608541}}, {{ill|Sakata|ja|酒田県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sakata|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鶴岡県|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 鶴岡県|1=Tsuruoka Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11675967}}, {{ill|Aizu-Wakamatsu|ja|若松県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizu-Wakamatsu|1=Wakamatsu Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11616428}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano|1=Nagano Prefecture}}, {{ill|Aikawa|ja|相川県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aikawa|1=Aikawa Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11582007}}
|-
|Eighth||'''{{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|qid=Q71699|lt=Aomori|1=Aomori Prefecture}}''', {{ill|Fukushima Prefecture|en|Fukushima Prefecture|qid=Q71707|lt=Fukushima|1=Fukushima Prefecture}}, {{ill|Iwaki|ja|磐前県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iwaki|1=Iwasaki Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11587859}}, {{ill|Mizusawa|ja|水沢県|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizusawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 磐井県|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 磐井県|1=Iwai Prefecture|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11587852}}, {{ill|Iwate Prefecture|en|Iwate Prefecture|qid=Q48326|lt=Iwate|1=Iwate Prefecture}}, {{ill|Akita Prefecture|en|Akita Prefecture|qid=Q81863|lt=Akita|1=Akita Prefecture}}, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|en|Yamagata Prefecture|qid=Q125863|lt=Yamagata|1=Yamagata Prefecture}}, {{ill|Miyagi Prefecture|en|Miyagi Prefecture|qid=Q47896|lt=Miyagi|1=Miyagi Prefecture}}
|}
